title: sedum annuum subsp. litoreum
intro: Sedum annuum subsp. litoreum, also known as the coastal stonecrop, is a succulent plant species within the Crassulaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Sedum annuum subsp. litoreum can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, teas, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
